name: 吐纳打坐（基底）
description: 吐纳基底（抽象，不直接使用）。
//: 吐纳打坐的抽象基底：收纳所有功法吐纳变体的公共字段。各功法的吐纳法术 copy-from 本基底，只覆盖 name/description（魔功另覆盖少量 flag）。所有变体的 effect_str 都指向同一个 EOC_immortal_path_meditate——打坐结算逻辑（经验/疲惫/灵气）单一来源、零复制；EOC 与具体 spell 无关（u_ 即施法者）。base_casting_time 96000≈16 分钟一次施法；连续约 4 次（≈1 小时）凑成「一轮」，第 5 次起心神疲惫满、收益归零自然截断（见 EOC 与 qi_fatigue）。/ Abstract base for all breathing-art variants. Each art's meditation spell copies from this and overrides only name/description. All variants share EOC_immortal_path_meditate for settlement (single source, no duplication). One cast ≈16 min; ~4 casts (~1 hour) make a 'bout', the 5th yields nothing as fatigue caps.

name: 吐纳打坐
description: 盘膝静坐，吐纳天地灵气，温养经脉。耗费时间，补充灵气，并累积炼气境修为。
//en_us_description: Sit in meditation, breathing in the qi of heaven and earth to nourish the meridians. Takes time; restores qi and accumulates Qi Refining cultivation.
//: 最基础的吐纳法术（由「吐纳引气诀」残卷授予）。无五行偏向，是其它功法吐纳变体的参照。施法即打坐，结算见 EOC_immortal_path_meditate。/ The most basic breathing art (granted by the breathing-method scroll). No phase affinity; the reference variant for all arts.

中性吐纳的 phase 包装（基础吐纳打坐 / 魔功，无五行偏向）：置阻碍除数 u_qi_pol_hinder = 1（无相克惩罚），再运行共享结算 EOC_immortal_path_meditate。五行吐纳各有自己的 phase 包装覆盖 effect_str；本 neutral 由抽象基底默认指向，故基础吐纳与未单列的变体走此路。/ Neutral breathing wrapper (basic meditation / demonic, no phase bias): set divisor 1 (no conflict penalty) then run the shared settlement EOC. Elemental variants override effect_str to their own phase wrapper; this neutral is the abstract-base default.

木行吐纳的 phase 包装：先置入相克阻碍除数 u_qi_pol_hinder = polarization_metal×polarization_earth（金克木、木克土）（木的两个相克邻位极化之积），再运行共享结算 EOC_immortal_path_meditate（经验会被该除数压低）。专修木行或仅叠相生时这两通道恒 1、除数 1 无惩罚；混入相克两系则越偏越慢。/ Wood-phase breathing wrapper: set the conflict divisor u_qi_pol_hinder = polarization_metal×polarization_earth (product of the two controlling-phase polarizations for Wood), then run the shared settlement EOC (exp is divided by it).

火行吐纳的 phase 包装：先置入相克阻碍除数 u_qi_pol_hinder = polarization_water×polarization_metal（水克火、火克金）（火的两个相克邻位极化之积），再运行共享结算 EOC_immortal_path_meditate（经验会被该除数压低）。专修火行或仅叠相生时这两通道恒 1、除数 1 无惩罚；混入相克两系则越偏越慢。/ Fire-phase breathing wrapper: set the conflict divisor u_qi_pol_hinder = polarization_water×polarization_metal (product of the two controlling-phase polarizations for Fire), then run the shared settlement EOC (exp is divided by it).

土行吐纳的 phase 包装：先置入相克阻碍除数 u_qi_pol_hinder = polarization_wood×polarization_water（木克土、土克水）（土的两个相克邻位极化之积），再运行共享结算 EOC_immortal_path_meditate（经验会被该除数压低）。专修土行或仅叠相生时这两通道恒 1、除数 1 无惩罚；混入相克两系则越偏越慢。/ Earth-phase breathing wrapper: set the conflict divisor u_qi_pol_hinder = polarization_wood×polarization_water (product of the two controlling-phase polarizations for Earth), then run the shared settlement EOC (exp is divided by it).

金行吐纳的 phase 包装：先置入相克阻碍除数 u_qi_pol_hinder = polarization_fire×polarization_wood（火克金、金克木）（金的两个相克邻位极化之积），再运行共享结算 EOC_immortal_path_meditate（经验会被该除数压低）。专修金行或仅叠相生时这两通道恒 1、除数 1 无惩罚；混入相克两系则越偏越慢。/ Metal-phase breathing wrapper: set the conflict divisor u_qi_pol_hinder = polarization_fire×polarization_wood (product of the two controlling-phase polarizations for Metal), then run the shared settlement EOC (exp is divided by it).

水行吐纳的 phase 包装：先置入相克阻碍除数 u_qi_pol_hinder = polarization_earth×polarization_fire（土克水、水克火）（水的两个相克邻位极化之积），再运行共享结算 EOC_immortal_path_meditate（经验会被该除数压低）。专修水行或仅叠相生时这两通道恒 1、除数 1 无惩罚；混入相克两系则越偏越慢。/ Water-phase breathing wrapper: set the conflict divisor u_qi_pol_hinder = polarization_earth×polarization_fire (product of the two controlling-phase polarizations for Water), then run the shared settlement EOC (exp is divided by it).

一次打坐施法完成的结算。经验增益 = round( 基础 33 × 心神疲惫乘子(疲惫度) )——只打折疲惫，不再乘饱和：「越高越慢」已由递增经验曲线（immortal_path_realm_exp_for_level，exp_for(L)=86·L·(L+1)）承担，打坐给的是固定不打折的基础 exp，仅受「连打疲惫」这一 session 级因素影响。一次施法 base_casting_time 96000≈16 分钟、+22 疲惫；疲惫乘子无保底（疲惫满归零），故连续约 4 次（≈1 小时、约 78 exp）后疲惫达 88、第 5 次收益归零自然截断——这就是「一轮」。qi_fatigue 按 7 分钟/点慢退，一轮约 10 小时退尽，正常作息每日自然约 2 轮、合计约 156 exp，纯打坐约 100 天炼气圆满。丹药/炼化等其他来源给同口径 exp、不受打坐疲惫牵连，高层吃丹靠曲线自动只推进更少层数。然后累加心神疲惫（每轮 +8，vitamin rate 随时间自然退），更新层数显示变量，补灵气并钳制到动态上限。消息按情境给一条状态行（疲惫重/将满/正常）+ 可选的灵气已满、升层提示，附带本轮经验与「本层进度 P/本层所需」。注意：未学会 spell 的 u_spell_exp 返回 -1，必须 max(0,...) 兜底（off-by-one 根因）。疲惫/层数按「本轮开始时」取值，避免本轮升层或加疲惫后回算本轮。set_spell_exp 对未知 spell（值≥0）自动习得。**属性极化阻碍**：经验再除以 u_qi_pol_hinder（相克阻碍除数）——由各五行吐纳的 phase 包装 EOC（EOC_immortal_path_meditate_phase_*）在调用本 EOC 前置入，等于「本系两个相克邻位」极化之积（如修火=水克火×火克金的金，即 polarization_water×polarization_metal）。专修一门或相生组合时两相克通道恒 1、除数 1 无惩罚；混修相克两系则越偏越慢，除数上限 4（最多慢到 1/4）。中性吐纳/魔功经 neutral 包装置 1。本 EOC 顶部对 u_qi_pol_hinder 做 (>0?min(,4):1) 兜底，直呼本 EOC（无包装）时退化为无惩罚。/ Per-cast payoff: exp = round(33 × fatigue_mult(fatigue)). No saturation factor — 'slower when higher' is intrinsic to the quadratic curve (exp_for(L)=86·L·(L+1)). One cast is base_casting_time 96000 ≈16 min, +22 fatigue; fatigue mult has no floor (0 at cap), so ~4 casts (~1 hour, ~78 exp) cap fatigue near 88 and the 5th yields nothing — that is one 'bout'. qi_fatigue decays 1 per 7 min so a bout clears in ~10 h; normal sleep/wake allows ~2 bouts/day, ~156 exp/day, ~100 days of pure meditation to fill Qi Refining. Pills/refining grant same-unit exp unaffected by meditation fatigue. Then accrue fatigue (+22/cast), refresh display vars, restore & clamp qi (+60).

then.u_message: 心神已疲，强行吐纳事倍功半（修为 +<u_val:qi_exp_gain>，炼气 <u_val:qi_refining_layer> 层 <u_val:qi_exp_into_layer>/<u_val:qi_layer_need>）。
then.//en_us_u_message: Your mind is weary; forcing more meditation yields little (cultivation +N; Qi Refining layer L, P/Q).

then.u_message: 炼气将满，每层所需修为剧增，纯吐纳精进缓慢（修为 +<u_val:qi_exp_gain>，炼气 <u_val:qi_refining_layer> 层 <u_val:qi_exp_into_layer>/<u_val:qi_layer_need>）。
then.//en_us_u_message: Qi Refining nears its peak; each layer demands far more cultivation and meditation alone crawls (cultivation +N; layer L, P/Q).

else.u_message: 你吐纳一周天（修为 +<u_val:qi_exp_gain>，炼气 <u_val:qi_refining_layer> 层 <u_val:qi_exp_into_layer>/<u_val:qi_layer_need>），灵气温养经脉。
else.//en_us_u_message: You complete a cycle of breathing; cultivation +N (layer L, P/Q), qi nourishes your meridians.

then.u_message: 丹田灵气已满，盈则溢，吐纳暂无益于蓄气。
then.//en_us_u_message: Your dantian is full of qi; brimming over, further breathing adds no qi.

then.u_message: 相克之力扰乱真气运转，本系修为难以凝练，进境大减。
then.//en_us_u_message: Conflicting phase-power disrupts the flow of true qi; same-phase cultivation will not coalesce, and progress is greatly reduced.

then.u_message: 修为精进！炼气已至 <u_val:qi_refining_layer> 层。
then.//en_us_u_message: Breakthrough! Qi Refining has reached layer N.
